channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Tree overhanging pavement, 6th June
item.description:
Tree branch overhanging the pavement is at head height. Can it please be trimmed back? Thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Willow Grove, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti needs removing from green utility box please, 6th June
item.description:
.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 300, Broadway, Blendon, Bexleyheath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Vegetation obstructs cars, 6th June
item.description:
When driving in this narrow lane the vegetation from the private development next to it scratches the cars, especially at meeting points.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St Dunstan's Lane, Park Langley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish, 6th June
item.description:
Rubbish

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Pevensey Avenue, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Loose slabs in path and road, 6th June
item.description:
Yet again the pedestrian crossing between boots and glades has lose slabs and the road is sinking. Please can this be inspected.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): High Street, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Previously reported flipping, 6th June
item.description:
3 weeks now from contractors at no 14 Bassano Street. Southwark will you take some enforcement action please? If I leave my refuse bin in the street you manage to write to me!!!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 9, Bassano Street, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped toilet & cistern, 6th June
item.description:
Someone has dumped an old toilet & cistern on the green opposite No 70
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Woodbank Road, Downham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown bushes and trees, 6th June
item.description:
Overgrown bushes and trees spilling over to the pavement parts are very dangerous

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Leycroft Gardens, Slade Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree branch overhanging / blocking pavement, 6th June
item.description:
Following recent high winds a tree branch has snapped causing an obstruction on pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Queen Anne Avenue, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter and weeds in the railings on North Cray Road, 6th June
item.description:
Could the litter be collected and the weeds be sprayed please. Thanks
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 135, North Cray Road, North Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned vehicle, 6th June
item.description:
Vehicle parked outside No. 34/36 Welton Road. It has a yellow penalty charge notice on window screen. Was left by the owner on the 2nd June and the driver then got into a friend's car straight away
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Welton Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Vegetation growing out of pavement from property, 6th June
item.description:
An ongoing problem where the does garden isn’t maintained leaving unsightly vegetation spilling over pavement and reducing access.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Blandford Avenue, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter bins full, 6th June
item.description:
Could the litter bins be emptied please? Thanks
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cocksure Lane, North Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: This street light is completely covered in leaves so it can't do its job., 6th June
item.description:
It has been like this for months and is getting worse - I previously logged it and it was marked as dealt with. The surrounding houses gardens are very overgrown and also obstructing the pavement on Troy Town (the now pedestrianised section opposite Bellenden School).

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dewar Street, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: By the bins by Bus stop B, 6th June
item.description:
Waste presented and not collected

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Premier Corner, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Street cleaning - Blue bags left on street

item.title: Fly-tipped mattress and bedding, 6th June
item.description:
Mattress dumped overnight 5th - 6th June 2026 against plane tree. Everthorpe Rd.(rear 118 Oglander Road.)
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 118, Oglander Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned vehicle, 6th June
item.description:
This car has been parked on Montbelle Road for a couple of months. It has no MOT or Tax.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Green Lane, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overhanging tree from private garden reducing width of the pavement, 6th June
item.description:
As tree came into leaf during the past few weeks, and the thru lack of attention/pruning, this tree on the corner is reducing the width of available pavement.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Westgate Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 6th June
item.description:
Mayow Road Remove graffiti from bus shelter for Perry Vale

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mayow Road, Perry Vale, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Graffiti / Flyposting on stop or shelter (non-offensive)

item.title: Fly tipping alleyway between cleve road da14 4rr and maylands drive da14 4rn, 6th June
item.description:
Builders constantly working in Maylands Drive during the week, weekends and Bank Holidays all day then unauthorised dumping of material, Cans bins, settees chairs in the alley connecting Maylands Drive DA14 4RN and Cleve Road DA14 4RR.Been going on for at least 5 yrs rubbish dumped very late at night or early hours of the morning.Alley needs notices monitoring and cameras. Builders noise effecting residents at Harefield Road DA14 4RJ and Goodwin Drive DA14 4NX.Loud speeding unlicesenced cars , electric scooters by kids motor bikes all no insurance even QUAD BIKES effecting St Andrews DA14 4SA and DA14 4RX, Cleve Road DA14 4RR and Kimberley Drive DA14 4PP and DA14 4QF residents totally annoyed happens all hours.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 125, Maylands Drive, Albany Park, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
